notes: Builds VERICODE (a taxonomy of 30 verifiable code instructions + deterministic verifiers) and the SWE-IF testbed, then benchmarks 31 LLMs measuring functional correctness and instruction following. Correlates metrics against pre-existing LMArena human-preference Elo ratings (secondary data, not newly collected participant data), so human_subjects=false. A small manual spot-check of 100 instances by two authors is validation, not a user study.
